name: CrossWire Expatriate Gasless Remittance Policy
description: Sponsors all verification and remittance transfers for expatriate contractors on Arc Testnet.

rules.comment: Sponsor USDC allowance approvals for CrossWireRouter
Sponsor EURC allowance approvals for Spot FX Swaps
Sponsor single expatriate SWIFT-compliant wire transfers
Sponsor mass programmatic B2B payouts executed in one transaction
